# Domain Drill #1 — Cloud SIEM Fundamentals for AWS (15 Q)

> Week 1 consolidation. ~20 minutes timed.

**1.** A Security Signal generated by Cloud SIEM is best described as:
A. An indexed log event
B. A detection rule's output object that includes evidence, severity, and MITRE annotations
C. An APM trace span
D. A compliance posture finding

**2.** When you enable Cloud SIEM, what does Datadog automatically create?
A. A dashboard only
B. A dedicated security log index that must be prioritized correctly
C. An archive in S3
D. A new AWS account

**3.** Detection runs against logs that match the Security Filter ____.
A. Only if those logs are also indexed in a Standard Index
B. Only if those logs are in Flex Logs
C. Regardless of which storage tier the log is in
D. Only after rehydrate from Archive

**4.** The Cloud SIEM Investigator's primary value is:
A. Replacing the Logs Explorer
B. A graphical pivot from a signal to all related entities and activity
C. Generating compliance evidence
D. Configuring AWS

**5.** Which AWS log source is best for detecting suspicious east-west / outbound IP flows?
A. CloudTrail · B. WAF · C. VPC Flow Logs · D. EKS audit

**6.** Which AWS log source most directly surfaces IAM and AWS API misuse?
A. CloudTrail · B. WAF · C. ELB · D. CloudFront

**7.** Which is NOT a Datadog-recommended security `source:` tag?
A. `cloudtrail` · B. `guardduty` · C. `vpc` · D. `aws-billing`

**8.** A Bits AI Security Analyst label can be:
A. Investigating, Benign, or Suspicious
B. Open / Closed
C. Pending / Approved
D. Pass / Fail

**9.** A Security Signal's MITRE ATT&CK annotation includes:
A. Tactic + Technique
B. CVE ID
C. Severity only
D. Customer name

**10.** RBAC for SIEM signals:
A. Is built on `security_monitoring_signals_read` and related permissions
B. Doesn't exist
C. Is only managed at AWS IAM level
D. Requires manual JSON

**11.** The Datadog **Security Filter**:
A. Defines which logs Cloud SIEM is allowed to analyze for detection
B. Defines retention
C. Replaces dashboards
D. Disables Bits AI

**12.** Which is OUT of scope for the Cloud SIEM Fundamentals exam?
A. Cloud SIEM Architecture
B. Datadog APM
C. AWS Integration
D. OCSF

**13.** The recommended minimum hands-on experience for ideal candidates is:
A. 1 month · B. 3 months · C. 6 months · D. 12 months

**14.** Where do triaged Security Signals live?
A. Security Signals Explorer
B. Logs Explorer
C. Synthetics
D. APM service map

**15.** Which Datadog product (NOT Cloud SIEM) scans cloud configuration state for misconfigurations?
A. Cloud Security Misconfigurations / CSPM
B. Sensitive Data Scanner
C. Workload Protection
D. RUM

---

## Answer key
1-B 2-B 3-C 4-B 5-C 6-A 7-D 8-A 9-A 10-A 11-A 12-B 13-C 14-A 15-A
